issues.description: Condition is 'Always' but card text requires 'Leader has 0 power or less'. No condition type exists for power comparisons in the DSL spec; this should be documented as a limitation or the condition should reflect the actual game state dependency.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Draw 1 card if your Leader has 0 power or less.

effects.note: Conditional on Leader power ≤ 0 (not encodable in current DSL)
